## Live Session Recordings<br>Data Driven Finance I<br>Spring 2026<br><br>![](RiceBusiness-transparent-logo-sm.png){height="60"}<br>

- [Jan 11](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/8JN7DCO8S0HKYhStkO3QWqkpbmh8cjAkB5pe4BqPGWHSEKsM167GwljbhMtOMuKJ.tBHbehvO72g-lYHg 
Passcode: #BUSI721)

- [Jan 19](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/xEnKN7AmZyllay7d3IKM5c_VTTIuHc4_Rs6IwsRZPE60wwCFoNud0ZWBuS89Vykp.3bKdU3-IbTvJQfxq 
Passcode: #BUSI721)

- [Jan 26](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/ldbXqVK2ofIql1-DWBWaRGILhqebKe5Cql9yjEpLtxQ5065YLjN0WQut47jh65KH.N6mao87l5iQ2WQkP 
Passcode: #BUSI721)

- [Feb 2](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/Ej329nP7C9OYwAqGsS3U-y2sDMyKSxRAWUPtkPLJohsGy_fGtNddP07FAZjrkv-p.jr3J_98b3mqdCefP 
Passcode: #BUSI721)

- [Feb 9](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/4onP712yU-IRzWjjs0VABYV7RBCUkt6hOVBw-ECumpMMra2C8icgO0UmeFl2bgxZ.Ncg2uOQIz6YwPZ5b 
Passcode: #BUSI721)

- [Feb 16](https://jgsb.zoom.us/rec/share/qmOI4nK30vNGc7qhAyiyhmBxad1gofjiGm5dn4gK1Vow-tFBsi427MPtPF-ZcRbv.YEpi7uP_L4o4x3nk 
Passcode: #BUSI721)
